name: fable-mcp
description: Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity plugin/MCP server that lets host agents consult Claude Fable 5 as a deep-reasoning architect via Claude Code headless mode

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check hooks/fable-loop-stop.mjs && node --check hooks/fable-loop-prompt-submit.mjs && node --check hooks/inject-fable-instructions.mjs && node --check scripts/sync-plugin.mjs && node --check scripts/run-python.mjs && node --check scripts/fable-loop-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-claude-auth.mjs && node --check scripts/configure-codex-plugin-env.mjs && node --check scripts/auth-setup-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/model-effort-smoke.mjs && node --check dist/server.bundled.mjs && node --check plugins/fable-mcp/dist/server.bundled.mjs && node --check plugins/fable-mcp-cursor/dist/server.bundled.mjs && node --check plugins/fable-mcp-antigravity/dist/server.bundled.mjs
